experiment_title: 氯化钙的物理性质及其溶解性观察实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="氯化钙的物理性质及其溶解性观察实验" goal="观察氯化钙的颜色、物理状态及其在水中的溶解性" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="spatula_1" type="spatula" />
      <Component id="weighing_paper_1" type="weighing_paper" />
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="50mL" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="50mL" />
      <Component id="glass_rod_1" type="glass_rod" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Calcium_Chloride" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="weighing_paper_1" reagent="CaCl2" mass="2 g" tool="spatula_1" id="step_0" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_1" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="weighing_paper_1" to_vessel="beaker_1" volume="all" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" reagent="H2O" volume="30 mL" id="step_3" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" to_vessel="beaker_1" volume="30 mL" id="step_4" />
      <Insert tool="glass_rod_1" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_5" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_7" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

output.response: 你现在已经具备观察和搅拌的条件了。你可以试着仔细看看氯化钙溶解时，溶液有没有发生什么变化？比如温度有没有升高或者降低，溶液是不是变得更加透明了？你觉得这些现象和氯化钙的溶解过程有什么关系？你愿意描述一下你观察到的具体现象吗？或者你还有什么想进一步验证的地方？
